Message top connections

About

Indian-Singaporean in NYC. Specialist in growth strategy for consumer-facing businesses, translating creative thinking into scalable, data-driven systems. Over a decade of experience driving growth across D2C, media, and digital brands. Expert at translating data into executive insights, forecasting, and resource allocation to drive user engagement and revenue. Proficient with marketing analytics (CPM, CTR), alongside A/B testing and designing experimentation frameworks to deliver measurable impact. Focused on full-funnel optimization across paid, earned, and owned channels, with an emphasis on ROI and channel performance. Built and scaled original IP and repeatable content franchises to drive brand relevance, sustained engagement, and monetization. Experience scaling digital platforms through media and venture-building experience. MBA Class of 2025 (December) graduate from INSEAD, the world #2 business school as ranked by the Financial Times. BFA from NYU’s Tisch School of the Arts (Class of 2020 Honors Graduate) with a business minor from NYU Stern. Former Producer at Vox Media and Co-founder of NYC-based startup Ashes Artist Collective, with additional experience across Disney, DreamWorks, CNN, and Warner Bros. Discovery.

Activity

1,439 followers

  • Simone Bhagat

    • 2nd

    Growth Strategy, Consumer & Platform Businesses | INSEAD MBA | NYU Tisch

    1w •

    SXSW 2026: 12-hour days, new relationships, and soaking up ideas from the smartest in my field.

    Coming out of a year of continuous learning at INSEAD, my week in Austin was a powerful reset into the evolving worlds of media, entertainment, tech, and innovation.

    Naturally, AI was a dominant theme. Marketing leaders are restructuring teams, and PE investors are prioritising firms with AI embedded at their core.

    However, I spent my time focusing on the shifting landscapes of content, brand, and digital monetisation strategy. From the creator economy to corporations building full ecosystems around audiences, it is clear that for the strongest brands, culture and connection are top of mind, and outweigh technological disruption.

    Some highlights:

    🤝 Meeting Alex, Haley, Daniel, Anjali, the American South Asian Network (ASAN) team + more!
    📈 Scott Galloway on AI and optimism: “If you also love data & trends, you constantly need to ask yourself what could go right.”
    💜 NYU Tisch School of the Arts alumni meet-up
    💡Julian Holguin (Rolling Stone), Rachael Zaluzec (Volkswagen) and Edward Pilkington (Diageo) on keeping legacy brands relevant
    📊 Ashley (Howard) Neville (Carta) on startup trends and raising capital. Founders “need to fall in love with the problem, not the solution.”
    📺 TV Role Models: Lisa Kudrow & Michael Patrick King. Andy Cohen & Matt Strauss (Bravo TV). Steve Carell + the Rooster team: building lasting cultural impact through stories
    🎙️ Ray Chao (Vox Media), Brandon Feldman (YouTube), Kaya Yurieff, Tefi Pessoa on podcasting and long-form programming that audiences go out and seek
    🏰 The Walt Disney Company x Accenture: AI is breaking down siloes and creating a shared language for collaboration
    🎬 "The Sun Never Sets" screening (Dakota Fanning, Jake Johnson, Cory Michael Smith, Debby Ryan)
    📱 David Pogue & Phil Schiller in a candid conversation on "Apple: The First 50 Years"

    What a week. I can’t wait for the next - for more knowledge, friendships (and Texas BBQ).

    #SXSW #SXSW2026

    1/9

    Rhon Ziadeh and 74 others reactedRhon Ziadeh and 74 others

    1w •

    Very proud to see Group: The Schopenhauer Effect extended at the Quad Cinema through March 26! 🎬

    For independent films, a holdover week is meaningful. It signals that audiences are showing up, and that the experience is connecting.

    This weekend features a series of Q&As with producer     Jack Lechner, Dr. Elliot Zeisel, and members of the cast.

    If you’re in New York, tickets are available here:
    https://lnkd.in/ePYgTBHE

    Thank you to everyone who continues to support bold, character-driven storytelling.

    AGPA, ABRAMORAMA , Jack Lechner, Ronald Guttman , Elliot Zeissel, Alexis Lloyd, Mathilde Hauducoeur, Sylvia Guirand
    #ExecutiveProducer #IndependentFilm #QuadCinema #TheSchopenhauerEffect #CinemaMatters

  • Simone Bhagat reposted this

    INSEAD

    753,115 followers

    1mo •

    INSEAD is #2 globally in the Financial Times MBA Ranking!   

    This recognition underscores the enduring strength and relevance of the INSEAD MBA in a world shaped by geopolitical shifts and rapid technological change.  

    Today, more than ever, our mission matters. Developing responsible leaders who can work across cultures and contexts has always been at the heart of INSEAD and this recognition reflects the impact of that commitment.  

    We’re proud of what our community achieves together and excited for what’s ahead.  

    To everyone who makes this possible, thank you!

    #INSEAD #INSEADMBA #MBA #ResponsibleLeadership

    Estefânia Esbaile and 2,161 others reactedEstefânia Esbaile and 2,161 others

  • Simone Bhagat

    • 2nd

    Growth Strategy, Consumer & Platform Businesses | INSEAD MBA | NYU Tisch

    3mo •

    It is considered somewhat unusual to migrate to the United States and then opt to attend an international institution, or to go to arts school and then pursue a business degree. I did both, and I truly believe it was my best life decision so far.

    The MBA program at     INSEAD offers far more than an understanding of how and where to apply the term “sunk cost”. While I am glad to say I know what that is, I am prouder to say that 2025 is the year I’ve developed the most personally, I’ve expanded my thinking immensely, and I’ve reshaped my life most courageously. While many enter an MBA to change job functions, sectors, or geographies, I can confidently say that even without those changes, a year at INSEAD offers transformation unlike any other.

    I’m proud to now be an MBA graduate and alum from INSEAD’s Class of ‘25D. Completing a two-year degree in under a year was both intense and incredibly fulfilling. I’m extremely grateful to have had the opportunity to live in Europe, and to have studied amongst the most intelligent and interesting people from 75 different countries. Thank you to my parents who encourage and support me, the faculty who taught me, and the friends near and far who cheer for me. No matter where I go next, I am privileged to be an INSEADer for life.

    #inseadmba #mbagraduate #mba #inseadgrad #inseadmoments #classof2025

    1/2

    Felipe Monteiro and 347 others reactedFelipe Monteiro and 347 others

    46 comments46 comments

    Comment

  • Simone Bhagat

    • 2nd

    Growth Strategy, Consumer & Platform Businesses | INSEAD MBA | NYU Tisch

    5mo •

    INSEAD London Tech Trek: A Warm Welcome by Google 🇬🇧💻

    A couple of weeks ago, together with fellow members of the INSEAD ‘25D class, I had the exciting opportunity to spend a couple days in London for our “Tech Trek,” organised by INSEAD’s Career Development Centre. Among a lineup of incredible firms, one highlight was our visit to Google's Central Saint Giles office, where we were welcomed with a warm and candid conversation by INSEAD alumni. As we prepare to join the alumni network ourselves, the visit offered an insider’s look not only into Google’s vibrant workspace but also into the diverse career paths fellow INSEADers have pursued in tech after their MBA.

    A huge thank you to Miguel Ramos, Nancy Srivastava, and Gustavo dos Santos Lima for hosting us and sharing such thoughtful insights. Our discussion spanned everything from organisational culture to practical advice on where MBA graduates can thrive within tech, be it across product lines or specialised functions. We also gained valuable first-hand perspectives on Google’s current priorities, from advancing AI in the public domain to fostering internal innovation.

    On behalf of Tech@INSEAD | TMT Students Club, we are truly inspired by the impact our INSEAD community continues to make at Google 💙

    #inseadmba #inseadtmt #inseadcareers #inseadalumni #mbacareers #google

    1/2

    70 reactions70

    Comment
    Send

  • Simone Bhagat

    • 2nd

    Growth Strategy, Consumer & Platform Businesses | INSEAD MBA | NYU Tisch

    5mo •

    On Tuesday, I had the absolute privilege of welcoming my dear friend Kunal Guha (Director of Platforms & Devices, Google) back to the INSEAD arena for a “Tech Talk,” hosted in partnership with the Tech@INSEAD | TMT Students Club, where I serve on the leadership committee. An INSEAD alum from the #GEMBA program, Kunal led an open and insightful conversation on responsible AI development, building a career in big tech, and navigating bold professional leaps.

    Tech and innovation are top of mind at INSEAD, and it’s no surprise that post-MBA paths are becoming increasingly digital-focused, with many graduates viewing tech firms as prime grounds for strategy, transformation, and change leadership. Kunal’s words were not only rich with expertise but also deeply personal and eye-opening for those of us considering where and how to drive meaningful impact.

    Thank you, Kunal, for such an inspiring session! It’s always a joy to catch up, and even more special to share that with the school we both love. 💚

    #tech #TMT #responsibleAI #INSEADMBA #INSEADGEMBA #INSEADalumni #INSEADalumninetwork #Google

    1/2

  • Simone Bhagat reposted this

    INSEAD Private Equity Club (IPEC)

    7,208 followers

    1yr • Edited •

    🔹 Insights from a Stalwart Investor: A Special Session with Chinta Bhagat 🔹

    We were privileged to learn from Chinta Bhagat, one of the leading minds in the world of investing, for an inspiring session on what makes a great investor—from the power of relationships to the critical decisions that shape investment success.

    A proud INSEAD alumnus, Chinta has spent over three decades in leadership roles across investing, consulting, and operations, with a significant focus on healthcare and wellness. He now leads Aries Holdings, an independent investment firm operating across India and the U.S. Previously, he was Head of Asia at L Catterton with AUM of $37bn, and Co-Head of Global Private Markets at Khazanah Nasional Berhad with AUM of $36bn. Before that, he spent over a decade at McKinsey & Company, including six years as Managing Partner of Singapore.

    ✨ What made this session even more special? Chinta was interviewed by his daughter, Simone Bhagat, an INSEAD MBA student—25 batches younger than him. A true full-circle moment!

    We’re grateful to Chinta for sharing his wisdom with the next generation of investors.
    #INSEAD #PrivateEquity #Investing #Leadership #INSEADAlumni

    1/3

    - 75 Nationalities
    - 6 Average years of work experience

Experience

Digital Marketing Assistant (MBA Summer Experience)

The Bicester Collection

Jul 2025 - Aug 2025 · 2 mos

Paris, Île-de-France, France · On-site

Joined the Digital Marketing team at Value Retail, between their offices at Bicester Village (London, UK) and La Vallée Village (Paris, France). Evaluated ROI and incremental impact of digital channels (Snapchat, email, LinkedIn) against MMM benchmarks, and defined channel optimization strategies to improve acquisition efficiency through experimentation and performance analytics.

Growth Marketing, Digital Marketing and +3 skills

Vox Media

Full-time · 3 yrs 3 mos

New York, New York, United States

  • Producer

    Apr 2023 - Dec 2024 · 1 yr 9 mos

    Launched and scaled a short-form content vertical, driving growth (e.g. 100% YoY follower increase on TikTok) while innovating new content formats and translating platform and audience insights into monetizable IP, strategic and repeatable growth frameworks, and brand partnerships.

    Strategy, Project Management and +4 skills

  • Associate

    Oct 2021 - Apr 2023 · 1 yr 7 mos

Co-Founder

Ashes Artist Collective

Jul 2020 - Jun 2021 · 1 yr

New York, New York, United States

Founded and scaled New York’s pioneering digital-first media and workforce startup at the height of the pandemic, creating paid opportunities for 100+ creatives. Built operating infrastructure, go-to-market strategy, and KPI-driven growth systems while producing six films, launching a 300+ member digital database, and hosting hybrid networking events to support displaced talent.

Management, Entrepreneurship and +4 skills

CNN Production Intern

Warner Bros. Discovery

Sep 2019 - Dec 2019 · 4 mos

New York, United States

Supported production and content development for Season 13 of documentary-style show, "CNN Heroes" and the "CNN Heroes Tribute Show" filmed live in New York, contributing research and broadcast execution for a nationally televised program, hosted by Anderson Cooper, Kelly Ripa and celebrity guests.

CNN Heroes 2019 (Season 13)

Video Production and Producing

Intern

The Walt Disney Company

Jul 2019 - Sep 2019 · 3 mos

Glendale, California

Analyzed UX, business impact, and ROI of creative assets deployed across Disney Parks’ digital platforms (apps and websites), delivering data-driven insights to inform product and content investment decisions.

Marketing and Producing
